description: You are a Database Administrator configuring secure data access for the Business Intelligence team. Provision a dedicated, read-only MariaDB user for the socioboard database that can only access sanitized views. Create a view named bi_user_export from the core user accounts table excluding the password column. Create a view named bi_social_export from the social media accounts table excluding any columns containing 'token' or 'secret' in their names. Create a new user bi_viewer@localhost identified by the password SecureBI#2025 and grant it SELECT privileges only on these two views, ensuring no access to base tables. Verify the configuration by querying the bi_user_export view as the bi_viewer user and saving the output to /home/ga/bi_initial_extract.csv. Connection details: database socioboard, user socioboard (password: SocioPass2024!) or root (no password).
